assertions.description: No detection of PLL loop filter (R25/R26/C44/C45/C47 form RFFC5072 charge pump filter)
No RF switch detection for MXD8546F (SPDT) and MXD8638C (SP4T) RF switches critical to the signal routing
No identification of the complete RF signal path: antenna -> balun -> switch -> mixer -> IF balun -> transceiver -> baseband
FM8625H/BGS12P2L6 (U5, U6, U7) are RF amplifier switches but not detected in any RF analysis
Power sequencing between multiple domains (VCC, VAA, 2V5RF, 1V2FPGA, etc.) not analyzed despite being critical for FPGA+RF design
REVIEW: All capacitor farads values are raw numbers without SI prefix conversion: 18 pF stored as farads=18.0 instead of 1.8e-11, 100 pF as 100.0 instead of 1e-10, 1 uF as 1.0 instead of 1e-6
REVIEW: All inductor henries values are raw numbers without SI prefix conversion: 10 nH stored as henries=10.0 instead of 1e-8, 2.2 uH as 2.2 instead of 2.2e-6
REVIEW: Crystal effective_load_pF calculated as 9000000000003.0 instead of ~12 pF due to farads=18.0 for 18pF caps
REVIEW: All RC filter cutoff frequencies are 0.00 Hz and time constants are thousands of seconds due to wrong farads values
REVIEW: All LC filter resonant frequencies are 0.01-0.11 Hz instead of MHz/GHz range for RF filters due to wrong farads/henries
REVIEW: Decoupling total_capacitance_uF values are millions (e.g. 55000000.0 uF for VCC rail) instead of tens of uF
REVIEW: BGB741L7ESD (U38, U40) are RF LNAs but misclassified as power_regulators with topology=unknown
REVIEW: RF chain amplifiers list is empty despite BGB741L7ESD (LNA), TRF37C73 (RF amp), MGA-81563 being present
REVIEW: RF chain switches list is empty despite MXD8546F (U1, U2) and MXD8638C (U9, U12, U14) RF switches being present
REVIEW: RF matching list is empty despite extensive matching networks around baluns and mixer
REVIEW: I2S0_RX_SDA and I2S0_TX_SDA nets misidentified as I2C SDA lines (these are I2S audio data lines)
REVIEW: MIXER.SDATA net misidentified as I2C SDA (this is a SPI-like serial data line for RFFC5072)
REVIEW: Decoupling has_bypass and has_high_freq are both false for all rails despite 100nF and smaller caps being present
